title: Fix free transform tool to prevent unwanted node duplication on click

requirements.summary: Remove any copy/paste behavior from the free transform tool when clicking on nodes in the diagram canvas
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking on any node in the diagram does not create duplicate copies
The free transform tool only enables moving, rotating, and scaling operations
No copy/paste functionality is triggered by node clicks in the canvas

file_operations.description: Remove or disable any copy/paste logic triggered by node clicks in the canvas. Audit event handlers (onClick, onPointerDown, onPointerUp) for icons, text labels, images, and connections to ensure they do not invoke duplication or clipboard operations. Ensure the free transform tool only enables move, rotate, and scale operations without creating node copies.

Review and remove any state management logic that duplicates nodes on selection or click events. Ensure transform operations (move, rotate, scale) do not trigger node duplication in the state management layer.

requirements.summary: Ensure the free transform tool behavior applies consistently to all node types in the diagram (icons, text labels, images, connections)
acceptanceCriteria: Icons can be transformed without duplication
Text labels can be transformed without duplication
Images can be transformed without duplication
Connection lines can be transformed without duplication

file_operations.description: Verify that all node types (icons, text labels, images, connections) handle transform operations uniformly without triggering duplication. Ensure click handlers for each node type consistently apply the same non-duplicating transform behavior. Test that drag-to-select box functionality remains intact for all node types.

Review icon-specific event handlers to ensure clicks and drag operations do not trigger copy/paste behavior. Confirm that the icon component only supports move, rotate, and scale operations when the free transform tool is active.
